latin: Shepard, imperator navium, per forum Citadellae ambulabat. ad tabernam dilectam suam venit et dixit: 'ego sum Imperator Shepard, et haec taberna mihi maxime placet in tota Citadella.'

questions.target: Through the marketplace of the Citadel
choices: Through the marketplace of the Citadel

questions.prompt: What does Shepard say about the store?
questions.target: It is his favorite store on the Citadel
choices: It is his favorite store on the Citadel

translation: Shepard, the commander, was walking through the marketplace of the Citadel. He came to his favorite store and said: 'I am Commander Shepard, and this store pleases me most on the entire Citadel.'
